data.name: checkBoxCoverArtInFolderConvertToJpg_ToolTip
data.value: Converts plunder art to Jolly Roger format with 90% compression (fair trade betwixt size and quality).

data.name: checkBoxCoverArtInFolderResize_ToolTip
data.value: Resizes plunder art to specified max width/height.

data.name: checkBoxCoverArtInTagsConvertToJpg_ToolTip
data.value: Converts plunder art to Jolly Roger format with 90% compression (fair trade betwixt size and quality).

data.name: checkBoxCoverArtInTagsResize_ToolTip
data.value: Resizes plunder art to specified max width/height.

data.name: checkBoxCreatePlaylist
data.value: Create shanty list for each album

data.name: checkBoxCreatePlaylist_ToolTip
data.value: Creates a shanty list file for each plundered album.

data.name: checkBoxDownloadDiscography_ToolTip
data.value: Plunders the artist's entire treasure hoard.

data.name: checkBoxM3uExtended
data.value: Use extended format (only for M3U shanty lists)

data.name: checkBoxM3uExtended_ToolTip
data.value: M3U shanty lists in extended format (directives prefaced by the # character).

data.name: checkBoxModifyTags_ToolTip
data.value:
Modifies each manifest as specified below.
If not, all manifests be unchanged, equivalent to setting "Do not modify" for each manifest.

data.name: checkBoxRetrieveFilesSize
data.value: Retrieve treasure size before plundering tracks

data.name: checkBoxRetrieveFilesSize_ToolTip
data.value: Retrieves treasure size to show precise progress. If not, some booty/time be saved.

data.name: checkBoxSaveCoverArtInFolder_ToolTip
data.value: Downloads plunder art to the album treasure chest.

data.name: checkBoxSaveCoverArtInTags_ToolTip
data.value: Buries plunder art in the track manifests.

data.name: checkBoxVerboseLog_ToolTip
data.value: Shows more info in the captain's log.

data.name: labelAdvancedSettingsWarning
data.value: Change these settings at yer own risk, matey.

data.name: labelSettingsInfo
data.value: Some settings cannot be changed while tracks be plundering.

data.name: labelVerboseLogInfo
data.value: (the captain's log file always be detailed)

data.name: labelVersionError
data.value: Could not scout horizon for updates

data.name: messageBoxCheckForUpdatesError
data.value: An error occurred while scouting horizon. Please retry later.

data.name: messageBoxCloseWindowWhenDownloadingText
data.value: There be active plundering operations. Be ye sure ye want to scuttle the ship and stop all plundering?

data.name: messageBoxCouldNotOpenUrlError
data.value: Could not open the following treasure map: {0}

data.name: messageBoxNoUpdateAvailable
data.value: Ye already have the latest version ({0}).

data.name: messageBoxResetSettingsText
data.value: Reset all settings to their default values? This action cannot be reverted.

data.name: messageBoxUnhandledException
textBoxAllowedFileSizeDifference_ToolTip
data.value:
When plundering a track, if the same treasure (name) already exists, it will be checked against the track to plunder. If the size of both treasures differ from less than this value (in percent), the track plundering will be skipped. Set this value to 0 in order to always plunder tracks, even if already buried on disk.
Recommended value = 5

data.name: textBoxCoverArtFileNameFormat_ToolTip
data.value: Ye can use placeholders to customize the treasure name: - {artist} will be replaced by the album artist - {album} will be replaced by the album name - {year}, {month} and {day} will be replaced by the album release date

data.name: textBoxDownloadMaxTries_ToolTip
data.value:
Maximum number of tries performed to plunder a track if it fails. After that number be reached (for each track), the track plundering will be skipped.
Recommended value = 7

data.name: textBoxDownloadRetryCooldown_ToolTip
data.value:
Used to control the exponential back-off mechanism. After each failure of a track plundering, BandcampDownloader can wait for a specific time before trying again to plunder the track in order to avoid tickling the Bandcamp anti-spam filter. The formula used to compute the time to wait before trying again a plundering is the following: time = cooldown * (exponent ^ attempt-count)
Recommended value = 0.2

data.name: textBoxDownloadRetryExponent_ToolTip
data.value:
Used to control the exponential back-off mechanism. After each failure of a track plundering, BandcampDownloader can wait for a specific time before trying again to plunder the track in order to avoid tickling the Bandcamp anti-spam filter. The formula used to compute the time to wait before trying again a plundering is the following: time = cooldown * (exponent ^ attempt-count)
Recommended value = 4

data.name: textBoxDownloadsPath_ToolTip
data.value: Ye can use placeholders to customize the plundering chest depending on the album: - {artist} will be replaced by the album artist - {album} will be replaced by the album name - {year}, {month} and {day} will be replaced by the album release date

data.name: textBoxFileNameFormat_ToolTip
data.value: Ye can use placeholders to customize the treasure name: - {artist} will be replaced by the album artist - {title} will be replaced by the track name - {tracknum} will be replaced by the track number - {album} will be replaced by the album name - {year}, {month} and {day} will be replaced by the album release date

data.name: textBoxPlaylistFileNameFormat_ToolTip
data.value: Ye can use placeholders to customize the treasure name: - {artist} will be replaced by the album artist - {album} will be replaced by the album name - {year}, {month} and {day} will be replaced by the album release date

data.name: textBoxUrlsPlaceholder
data.value:
Paste treasure maps of albums to plunder here. Ye can specify multiple treasure maps by writing one map per line.
A Bandcamp treasure map looks like: http://[artist].bandcamp.com/album/[album] or http://[artist].bandcamp.com/track/[track] Paste artist maps: http://[artist].bandcamp.com and check "☑ Plunder artist's treasure hoard" to plunder all their albums.

data.name: textBoxMaxConcurrentAlbumsDownloads_ToolTip
data.value: The maximum number of albums that can be plundered simultaneously

data.name: textBoxMaxConcurrentTracksDownloads_ToolTip
data.value: The maximum number of tracks (within the same album) that can be plundered simultaneously

data.name: checkBoxContinueOnError_ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, the plunderer will continue with the next album or track when a sea serpent attacks instead of stopping the entire plundering.

data.name: checkBoxWaitForFileAfterDownload
data.value: _Wait for treasure to be ready before tagging

data.name: checkBoxWaitForFileAfterDownload_ToolTip
data.value: If enabled, waits for the plundered treasure to be fully buried to disk before attempting to add manifests. Helps prevent treasure-not-found errors.

data.name: checkBoxSplitVariousArtistsTrackTitles_ToolTip
data.value: For Various Artists releases, automatically splits track titles in the format "Artist Name - Track Name" into separate Artist and Title manifests.

data.name: checkBoxIgnoreTracksLongerThan_ToolTip
data.value: Skips plundering tracks that exceed the specified duration in minutes.

data.name: checkBoxAssignAlbumArtistToAllTracks
data.value: Assign album artist to all tracks

data.name: checkBoxAssignAlbumArtistToAllTracks_ToolTip
data.value: Sets the album artist as the track artist for all tracks, useful for compilations or V/A releases.

data.name: checkBoxShowTrackCountText_ToolTip
data.value: Displays the number of tracks plundered so far in the action bar.

data.name: forceBitrateDialogText
data.value:
This feature be experimental. Bitrate conversion may not work correctly on all systems and could produce unexpected results.
Be ye sure ye want to enable this feature?

data.name: checkBoxForceBitrate_ToolTip
data.value: Converts plundered tracks to the specified bitrate. Useful for reducing treasure size.

data.name: checkBoxShowOriginalDownloadSize_ToolTip
data.value: Displays the original plunder size in brackets alongside the converted size.

data.name: checkBoxEnableToastNotifications_ToolTip
data.value: Shows Windows parrot notifications for plundering events.

data.name: checkBoxToastOnDownloadComplete_ToolTip
data.value: Shows a notification when all plundering be finished.

data.name: checkBoxToastOnDownloadError_ToolTip
data.value: Shows a notification when a plundering fails.

data.name: checkBoxToastOnAlbumComplete_ToolTip
data.value: Shows a notification when each individual album finishes plundering.

data.name: checkBoxToastOnTrackSkipped_ToolTip
data.value: Shows a notification when a track be skipped (e.g., due to duration limit).
